recommendations.title: The War
recommendations.overview: The son of a Vietnam War Veteran must deal with neighborhood bullies as well as his dad's post-traumatic stress disorder while growing up in the deep south in the 1970's.

recommendations.title: The Three Faces of Eve
recommendations.overview: A doctor treats a woman suffering from multiple personality disorder.

recommendations.title: The Master
recommendations.overview: Freddie, a volatile, heavy-drinking veteran who suffers from post-traumatic stress disorder, finds some semblance of a family when he stumbles onto the ship of Lancaster Dodd, the charismatic leader of a new "religion" he forms after World War II.

recommendations.title: BLACKPINK: Light Up the Sky
recommendations.overview: Record-shattering Korean girl band BLACKPINK tell their story —  and detail the hard fought journey of the dreams and trials behind their meteoric rise.

recommendations.title: Doctor Strange
recommendations.overview: Dr. Stephen Strange embarks on a wondrous journey to the heights of a Tibetan mountain, where he seeks healing at the feet of the mysterious Ancient One.
recommendations.director: Jay Oliva, Patrick Archibald, Dick Sebast

recommendations.title: ariana grande: excuse me, i love you
recommendations.overview: Ariana Grande takes the stage in London for her Sweetener World Tour and shares a behind-the-scenes look at her life in rehearsal and on the road.

recommendations.title: Sly
recommendations.overview: His love of film began as an escape from a rocky childhood. From underdog to Hollywood legend, Sylvester Stallone tells his story in this documentary.

recommendations.title: Deadpool
recommendations.overview: The origin story of former Special Forces operative turned mercenary Wade Wilson, who, after being subjected to a rogue experiment that leaves him with accelerated healing powers, adopts the alter ego Deadpool. Armed with his new abilities and a dark

recommendations.title: Cowspiracy: The Sustainability Secret
recommendations.overview: Follow the shocking, yet humorous, journey of an aspiring environmentalist, as he daringly seeks to find the real solution to the most pressing environmental issues and true path to sustainability.

recommendations.title: Obi-Wan Kenobi: A Jedi's Return
